scripts.voicebox:status: powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:17600/profiles | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:17493/profiles | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 }"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @phantomforce/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @phantomforce/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @phantomforce/server
